message:
fix: resolve frozen dispatch naming mismatch for anonymous functions

The ChildFuncInfo.name for anonymous functions was set to 'anonymous'
(via getAtomString fallback) while dispatch registration used '' (empty
string via getAtomByIndex). This caused 156K 'Name not found' errors
in registerCpoolBytecodeByName, preventing bytecode pointer registration
for anonymous closures.

Changes:
- module_parser.zig: Use getAtomByIndex instead of getAtomString for
  ChildFuncInfo naming, matching the AnalyzedFunction convention
- native_dispatch.zig: Strip 'anonymous' prefix in cpool lookup for
  backward compatibility with existing pre-built shards

Results: fclosure misses reduced 156K -> 46K (71% reduction),
bytecode registrations up from 2559 -> 2765.
